description: Evaluates authentication service maturity—authentication systems, IAM ownership, KPIs/KRIs, MFA, passwordless and phishing-resistant authentication, and SOC logging of authentication events.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: An authentication service exists and is reviewed frequently for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Authentication System
capabilities.description: A formal authentication system authenticates subjects to network and applications enterprise-wide, is reviewed frequently, and integrates with access control decision and enforcement points.
evaluation_focus: Formal authentication system for network and applications
Integration with access control decision and enforcement points

capabilities.name: IAM Engineer (Authentication service owner)
capabilities.description: An IAM engineer configures authentication policies, with central management when authentication is siloed across locations.
evaluation_focus: IAM engineer for authentication policy configuration

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Authentication KPIs and KRIs are documented and reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Subject and Object Authentication with robust multi factor authentication
capabilities.description: MFA is formally utilized as a second factor for all enterprise access and reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Subject and Object Authentication with passwordless authentication (certificates, biometric (FIDO compliant))
capabilities.description: Passwordless authentication methodologies are documented, deployed enterprise-wide or in scoped areas, and reviewed for enhancement.

capabilities.name: Phishing Resistant MFA
capabilities.description: Phishing-resistant MFA is documented, deployed enterprise-wide or in scoped areas, and reviewed for enhancement.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide vs scoped phishing-resistant MFA deployment
Phishing-resistant MFA design review and enhancement

capabilities.name: Authentication logging
capabilities.description: Authentication events including user lifecycle and failed authentications are logged securely to the SOC, including dynamic changes.
evaluation_focus: Secure authentication event logging to SOC

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
